name: Sage
description: Business management software with powerful accounting tools for small and medium enterprises.
longDescription: Sage, established in 1981 in Newcastle upon Tyne, UK, is a global leader in business management software, offering accounting, payroll, and financial management solutions tailored for small and medium enterprises. Known for its user-friendly interface and compliance with UK and European regulations, Sage empowers businesses to streamline financial operations with cloud-based and on-premise options.
